results.name: Shape of Reasoning Topological Analysis
results.rationale: TDA on reasoning traces shares topological-signature framing; operates on reasoning traces not attention curves; no 2-primitive vocab.

results.name: CoT TDA Understanding
results.rationale: TDA over CoT provides topological invariants akin to winding signature; differs in target + lacks vocabulary.

results.name: Hierarchical Concept Bottleneck Label-Free
results.rationale: Concept-bottleneck decomposition loosely analogous to 2-primitive C/S vocabulary; no topology + no KL defect.

results.name: Attention Heads Survey 4-Stage
results.rationale: Attention-head taxonomies overlap with per-head classification; lacks curve-primitive vocabulary + KL-projection repair.

results.name: Attention Heads Patterns Cell 2025
results.rationale: Pattern-based head characterization aligns with C/S decomposition + empirical head distribution; lacks topological winding + regional-style prior.

results.name: Backdoored LLM Attention Patterns Mechanistic
results.rationale: Detects defective/anomalous heads via attention-pattern deviation paralleling KL>tau out-of-style; differs by regional-style preferred distribution + projection repair.

results.name: Thought Anchors LLM Reasoning Steps
results.rationale: Reasoning-step anchoring orthogonal to attention-curve primitive decomposition.

results.name: Circuit Tracing Attribution Graphs
results.rationale: Circuit/attribution-graph methods provide structural per-component analysis; no curve vocabulary + no winding + no regional-style KL.

decision_rationale: No prior art reaches kw>=2 / sem>=0.7 / func>=0.7; 2-primitive C/S vocabulary + winding-number signature + regional-style KL-projection defect repair appear novel combination. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.86 / func 0.74-0.86 on TDA + attention head taxonomy adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged.
